en: My spirit is broken; my days are extinct; the graveyard is ready for me.
zh: “我的氣息將斷， 我的日子快盡， 墳墓已為我預備好了。

en: Surely there are mockers about me, and my eye dwells on their provocation.
zh: 真有嘲笑人的在我這裡， 我的眼看著他們的悖逆。

en: "Lay down a pledge for me with yourself; who is there who will put up security for me?
zh: 願你給我保證，親自為我作保； 除你以外有誰肯與我擊掌作保呢？

en: Since you have closed their hearts to understanding, therefore you will not let them triumph.
zh: 你蒙蔽了他們的心，不讓他們明白； 因此你必不高舉他們。

en: He who informs against his friends to get a share of their property- the eyes of his children will fail.
zh: 為分產業而控告朋友的， 他子孫的眼睛也要昏花。

en: "He has made me a byword of the peoples, and I am one before whom men spit.
zh: 他使我成為民眾的笑柄， 人人都吐唾沫在我的臉上。

en: My eye has grown dim from vexation, and all my members are like a shadow.
zh: 我的眼睛因憂愁而昏花， 我的身體瘦骨如柴。

en: The upright are appalled at this, and the innocent stirs himself up against the godless.
zh: 正直人必因此驚訝， 要被激發起來， 攻擊不敬虔的人。

en: Yet the righteous holds to his way, and he who has clean hands grows stronger and stronger.
zh: 義人必堅守自己的道路， 手潔的人要力上加力。

en: But you, come on again, all of you, and I shall not find a wise man among you.
zh: 然而你們眾人，可以再來， 在你們中間我找不到一個有智慧的人。

en: My days are past; my plans are broken off, the desires of my heart.
zh: 我的日子已過， 我的謀算和我心中所想的都已粉碎。

en: They make night into day; 'The light,' they say, 'is near to the darkness.'
zh: 他們把黑夜變為白晝， 因為黑暗的緣故，他們就說：‘光明臨近了。’

en: If I hope for Sheol as my house, if I make my bed in darkness,
zh: 我若等待陰間作我的家， 在黑暗中鋪張我的床榻；

en: if I say to the pit, 'You are my father,' and to the worm, 'My mother,' or 'My sister,'
zh: 我若對深坑說：‘你是我的父親’， 對蟲說：‘你是我的母親，我的姊妹’，

en: where then is my hope? Who will see my hope?
zh: 那麼，我的指望在哪裡呢？ 我的指望誰能看得見呢？

en: Will it go down to the bars of Sheol? Shall we descend together into the dust?"
zh: 等到安息在塵土中的時候， 那些指望必下到陰間的門閂那裡。”
